description:
**Responsibilities**

* Membantu Head of Internal Auditdalam melaksanakan Continuous Audit, pengembangan perangkat infrastruktur dan aplikasi yang digunakan dii internal tim, serta menyediakan analisa dan pengolahan data untuk keperluan penugasan audit yang relevan dan berkualitas.
* Melakukan aktivitas audit Data Analytics dan menyusun laporan/memo yang berkualitas dan tepat waktu.
* Melaksanakan Continuous Audit yang berkualitas, didukung oleh root-cause, bukti dan analisa yang memadai, sesuai dengan standar, serta memberikan rekomendası yang tepat serta dapat memberikan dampak perbaikan terhadap unit kerja terkait.
* Mengelola Audit Management System (AMS) sebagai sistem penunjang pelaksanaan audit.
* Bertanggung jawab untuk meningkatkan dan mengembangkan kemampuan termasuk teknik pengolahan analisa data, seperti: penggunaan parameter Continuous Audit dan supporting tools, agar dapat menunjang pelaksanaan audit perbasis risiko bagi tim audit intern secara berkelanjutan.
* Berperan aktif dalam memberikan masukan untuk meningkatkan efektivitas dan efisiensi kepada Internal Audit dan auditee, serta memberikan masukan terhadap inisiatif dan produk baru yang dapat memberikan nilai tambah.
* Memastikan hasil pemeriksaan dan bukti-bukti audit telah didokumentasikan dengan baik, lengkap, dan sesuai dengan standar yang ditetapkan.
* Melakukan analisa data dan konfirmasi anomali data yang ditemukan kepada pihak-pihak terkait.
* Melaksanakan adhoc audit terkait Data Analytics dan tugas konsultasi sesuai permintaan Direktur Utama, Dewan Komisaris dan/atau sesuai arahan Komite Audit selama tidak mempengaruhi obyektivitas dan independensi Internal Audit.

**Requirements**

* Pendidikan minimal S1 (Computer Science, Ilmu Komputer, Sistem Informasi atau any related educational background), dengan pengalaman minimal 1-3 tahun di bidang audit internal atau audit eksternal atau bidang terkait. (Fresh graduate dipersilakan untuk melamar).
* Memiliki pengetahuan mengenai audit internal terutama terkait dengan proses dan aktivitas audit.
* Memahami konsep manajemen risiko dan kepatuhan.
* Memiliki kemauan dan kemampuan belajar secara cepat.
* Sigap, bersikap proaktif, dan memiliki kemampuan dalam memecahkan masalah.
* Cermat pada detail dan memiliki kemampuan analisis.
* Memiliki kemampuan membuat prioritas dan penjadwalan.
* Memiliki kemampuan untuk meyakinkan auditee atau pihak-pihak terkait dengan pendekatan berbasis data.

job_title: Team Lead, Learning and Development (Contract, Remote)
description:
**OUR HIRING PROCESS:**

* We will review your application against our job requirements. We do not employ machine learning technologies during this phase as we believe every human deserves attention from another human. We do not think machines can evaluate your application quite like our seasoned recruiting professionals—every person is unique. We promise to give your candidacy a fair and detailed assessment.
* We may then invite you to submit a video interview for the review of the hiring manager. This video interview is often followed by a test or short project that allows us to determine whether you will be a good fit for the team.
* At this point, we will invite you to interview with our hiring manager and/or the interview team. Please note: We do not conduct interviews via text message, Telegram, etc. and we never hire anyone into our organization without having met you face-to-face (or via Zoom). You will be invited to come to a live meeting or Zoom, where you will meet our INFUSE team.
* From there on, it’s decision time! If you are still excited to join INFUSE and we like you as much, we will have a conversation about your offer. We do not make offers without giving you the opportunity to speak with us live.

INFUSE is committed to complying with applicable data privacy and security laws and regulations. For more information, please see our Privacy Policy
  
  
**INFUSE**
is a demand generation company providing solutions to B2B organizations. We help clients and partners to deliver audience, buyers, and account engagement that meets their goals. With a global team operating across more than 60 countries, the company has been recognized multiple times on the prestigious Inc. 5000 list, and has received over 60 other industry awards, including Inc. Best Workplaces.
  
  
INFUSE Academy drives both internal and external online education, creating smart, high-impact e-learning experiences that fuel real business results. Please watch this video to learn more.
  
  
We’re not just checking boxes – we’re designing innovative, engaging, and practical e-learning programs that empower people to grow and thrive.
  
  
As we scale, we’re looking for a strategic and growth-oriented
**Team Lead, Learning and Development**
to join our fast-paced, tight-knit team of passionate professionals. If you’re someone who brings bold ideas, loves experimenting with new approaches, and thrives in a collaborative environment, this is your moment.
  
  
**Our L&D Philosophy**
We’re committed to delivering practical, growth-driven education that aligns with both business objectives and learner needs. Most of our solutions are designed as self-paced, asynchronous e-learning experiences, enhanced with AI-powered tools and immersive learning simulators.
  
  
We believe learning should be engaging and story-driven. Inspired by platforms like Netflix, we continuously experiment with storytelling techniques to make development experiences more compelling and impactful.
  
  
**Role Overview**
As the
**Team Lead, Learning and Development**
, you’ll play a vital role in ensuring smooth collaboration within the Instructional Design Team, your departmental colleagues, as well as subject matter experts and stakeholders in other departments. You will lead the coordination of project timelines, manage approvals, facilitate communication, and support the overall workflow of our learning programs. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on structured planning, strong communication, and turning goals into actionable steps for the team.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Plan learning design projects with instructional designers, ensuring timelines, responsibilities, and deliverables are met, while fostering a positive, collaborative team environment.
* Translate project plans into clear task lists, assigning responsibilities and monitoring progress across the team.
* Serve as the main point of contact for other teams and stakeholders, building positive relationships, ensuring clarity, and aligning expectations throughout the project lifecycle.
* Organize and track the status of project approvals and reviews, proactively following up to keep workflows moving.
* Support people management functions such as assigning projects based on skills fit, monitoring capacity, and escalating bottlenecks where needed.
* Develop and manage a limited number of your own e-learning projects as an instructional designer.
* Support broader communication efforts – planning training launches, crafting clear, engaging messaging for both internal teams and client-facing audiences.
* Contribute to process improvements that enhance team collaboration and the scalability of INFUSE Academy operations.

**What We’re Looking For**

* Minimum 3 years of Mid-/Senior-level ID role experience or similar role within the L&D department.
* 1+ year of experience in team coordination, leadership, or project management within learning or related fields.
* Strong AI literacy. Experience with creating custom GPTs and scaling solutions across teams is a strong advantage.
* Strong communication and relationship-building skills, with experience in managing change within teams.

* Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual financial statements and management reports
* Work collaboratively with other corporate finance team members and regional teams to achieve accurate and timely results
* Complete foreign currency reasonableness calculations/proofs
* Assist in creating and developing efficiencies within consolidation process
* Assist in preparation of necessary audit schedules to support the financials and footnote disclosures
* Assist with analytical reviews of monthly, quarterly and annual financials
* Work with regional finance teams to align accounting policies and procedures for key areas globally
* Interface with external auditors for periodic financial reviews, controls testing and other inquiries
* Participate in special projects as deemed necessary

**Who are we looking for?**

* Minimum Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, related field
* Having at least 5 years of experience as a Finance Planning & Analysis Manager or Finance Controller in a Pharmaceutical or FMCG industry.
* Experience in consolidation and statutory min. 2 years.
* Strong ethic in handling confidential data.
* Good communication in English, both verbal and written.

description:
**Responsibilities**
In particular, the e-commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated. With millions of loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users.
  
  
As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.
  
  
Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early. Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 3 months long internship period.
  
  
**About The Team**
Tiktok Shop Partner (TSP) team, we orchestrate a nationwide network of agencies driving the livestream commerce, content, and store operations that keep TikTok Shop ahead of the curve. . You will work directly with our TSP strategy team consisting of four people.
  
  
As a TSP Business Analyst intern, you'll get your hands on the full analytical stack that drives one of Indonesia's most dynamic e-commerce operations : building and managing live performance dashboards, setting GMV and penetration targets across Account Managers and agency partners, and translating raw data into sharp recommendations that directly shape how TikTok Shop's livestream, content, and product strategies evolve. You will work with real numbers, , sharpening your SQL skillset while developing the kind of structured, data-driven thinking.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Manage dashboards, consisting of TSP performance, seller performance, and project performance
* Set up the GMV target and penetration target for each AM and TSP level
* Monitor the performance of TSP in e-commerce, including the GMV performance and content performance
* Analyse the performance of AM and TSP, provide recommendations on improvement especially related to Live-streaming, content operations, and product assortment strategy
* Support to help in any other general ad-hoc duties

**Qualifications**
Minimum Qualifications
  
  

* Actively enrolled University student (BS/BA/MS), preferably majoring in Data Science, Information System, Business, Economics, Finance, or Engineering
* Intermediate in SQL
* Advance Excel knowledge [Vlookup, Xlookup, Import Range, Sumif, Pivot table, etc]
* Good analytical thinker - Comfortable with data processing
* Happy to work with numbers

Preferred Qualifications
  
  

* Prior internship, freelance, or campus project experience in eCommerce (would be a plus)
* Eager to learn, hard worker and motivated

If you have any questions, please reach out to us at apac-earlycareers@tiktok.com
  
  
Job Information
  
  
**About TikTok**
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.
  
  
Why Join Us
  
  
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.
  
  
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.
  
  
Diversity & Inclusion
  
  
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

description:
**Job Description**

Synopsis

Perform, coordinate and execute sales activities for special accounts, to reach sales targets goals to contribute in Etihad's revenue objectives achievement

Accountabilities

* Participate in defining sales strategy and objectives to ensure alignment with overall Etihad objectives and external trends in conjunction with the General Manager. Develop, implement and manage the local sales channel strategy with guidance from the Business Development Unit in order to ensure the maximization of Etihad reach and revenue and profitability possibilities.

* Partner with Sales Strategy and Planning to develop, monitor and report on sales plans to ensure sales strategy is properly implemented across the markets and that all available tools, data and insight are being effectively used to ensure expected results are reached.

* Act as chief coach for your team, working with global sales enablement to ensure you have a data led, insight driven and innovative sales team. Motivate, coach and lead the commercial team to exceed targets. Measured by Revenue targets shared and exceeded by sales staff and Training plan agreement.

* Working with the regional business development unit, define territory/channel sales targets to ensure consistent contribution to overall Etihad results.

* Manage and coordinate dealing with partners to ensure achievement of agreed targets and respect of terms and conditions

* Develop and implement sales & marketing initiatives to ensure key revenue targets are met within budget

* Monitor sales KPIs and dashboards (based on revenue and cost of sale targets) to identify areas of improvement, new initiatives and propose corrective actions

* Develop close working relationships with local and international partners to identify joint marketing activities and strategies to boost sales

* Act as a sounding board and business partner to create and update current policies and stakeholder contracts ensuring compliance with the Etihad’s processes, policies, tools and the overall business strategy.

* Develop and maintain excellent relationships with the travel trade, corporate, guests, governments, ministries, etc. as relevant to your area of responsibility.

* Where applicable, this role may hold the EY Power of Attorney

**Qualifications**

Education & Experience

• Bachelor’s degree or above in Business or relevant Commercial & analytical work experience

• 5 years airline experience required in sales/trade/corporate

**Additional Information**

Etihad Airways is more than the UAE’s national airline - we’re shaping the future of global aviation. From our hub in Abu Dhabi, we connect people across continents and cultures, while driving our “Journey 2030” ambition to double our fleet, expand our network and grow our people for a new era of excellence. Join us and become part of a vision where the world is your workplace and extraordinary experiences take flight.

To learn more visit www.etihad.com

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
  
Beware of fraudulent job offers from individuals or organizations claiming to represent the Etihad group. We will never ask for personal information, bank details, or payment during the recruitment process. Interviews are conducted face-to-face or via video/telephone before any formal offer. If you are asked for money, please treat it as fraudulent.

description:
**Company Overview:**

Bukalapak's mission is to provide a fair economy for all. We envision a tech-enabled economy where everyone from all walks of life has the options and opportunities to get more out of life, powered by our innovative online and offline platform. We do this because we believe people deserve equal opportunity to create better lives for themselves and their loved ones. Bukalapak is one of the largest e-commerce companies in Southeast Asia. Founded in 2010, it now has more than 100 million users with various physical and virtual products, including small kiosks and an e-commerce platform.

**What does day-to-day look like?**

* Managing investment product operations, including transaction execution, reconciliation, monitoring and issue resolution to ensure accuracy, compliance, and timely processing.
* Supporting end-to-end implementation of new products and partnerships, including preparing required documentation (NDA, Due Diligence, agreements/PKS and other supporting documents), coordinating with internal and external stakeholders, ensuring operational readiness, and driving project execution from initiation through go-live while maintaining agreed timelines.
* Managing and maintaining relationships with existing partners by handling operational matters, monitoring service performance, coordinating issue resolution and identifying opportunities to improve existing products, processes, and customer experience.
* Supporting business growth initiatives by coordinating cross-functional projects, conducting operational assessments and assisting in the development and implementation of new business opportunities.
* Preparing operational, financial and partnership-related reports, performing data analysis and providing insights to management to support business planning, performance monitoring, and achievement of company targets.

**What does amazing look like?**

* Minimum Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Business, Finance, Economics, Management, or related fields
* Experience in investment operations, financial operations, or banking/fintech operations is preferred
* Detail-oriented with strong accuracy in
* handling transactions, reconciliation, and operational processes
* Fast learner with ability to quickly understand new products, systems, and processes
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with ability to work with data and reports
* Good coordination and communication skills to work with internal and external stakeholders
* Able to work in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities effectively
* Proactive, responsible, and able to follow through tasks with minimal supervision

**Bukalapak**
is an equal opportunity employer. Our hiring committee considers all applicants based on their merits and qualifications for each position. Bukalapak does not discriminate applicants on the basis of their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by applicable law. We embrace diversity and encourage inclusion because we believe that to help create A Fair Economy For All, we need to build a workplace for all #BukalapakForAll

* Monitor the implementation of improvement recommendations for the Quality and Food Safety System.
* Conduct periodic checks on reports provided by QC analysts for microbiology, incoming material, and in process control and report them to the QC Section Head.

description:
**Requirements**

* Pendidikan min. S1 (diutamakan Ekonomi)
* Berpengalaman min. 5 tahun di bidang manajemen risiko.
* Memiliki pengetahuan mengenai Operational Perbankan, Statistika, Credit Risk Modeling, Data Analyst, & Enterprise Rsk Management.

**Job Description**

1. Menyampaikan usulan dan konsolidasi terkait strategi penerapan manajemen risiko dari sisi Enterprise Risk Management.
2. Melakukan kajian dan analisa strategis terhadap kebutuhan bank dalam pengelolaan risiko stratejik untuk bank.
3. Menyiapkan dan memantau laporan terkait Stress test, Internal Capital Adequacy Assessment Process (ICAAP), Profil risiko stratejik, Tingkat kesehatan Bank dan Kewajiban Pemenuhan Modal Minimum (KPMM) untuk Bank dan konsolidasi.
4. Konsolidasi penerapan manajemen risiko atas 8 (delapan) jenis risiko utama dan 2 (dua) jenis risiko tambahan dari anak perusahaan untuk disampaikan kepada internal, eksternal dan regulator.
5. Melakukan kaji ulang secara berkala terkait kebijakan, SOP, juklak dan dokumen lain sesuai dengan perkembangan regulasi dan industri Perbankan yang berhubungan dengan penerapan manajemen risiko yang di sesuaikan ketentuan regulator yang terbaru untuk Bank dan konsolidasi.
6. Melakukan kajian Kebijakan, Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) dan produk serta aktivitas baru yang dikembangkan dan diperbaharui dari unit kerja di dalam Bank yang memiliki potensi risiko pasar.
7. Melakukan otomasi proses pengukuran penerapan manajemen risiko terintegrasi Konglomerasi Keuangan ke dalam sistem/aplikasi.
8. Melakukan identifikasi, pengukuran, pemantauan, dan pengendalian yang timbul dari aktivitas fungsional yang dilakukan oleh konglomerasi keuangan Sinarmas Financial Services serta memberikan rekomendasi atas hasil identifikasi, pengukuran dan pemantauan tersebut.
9. Penetapan dan kaji ulang metodologi yang digunakan dalam menerapkan kondisi Bank perlu menjalankan rencana aksi pemulihan (Recovery Plan).

description:
**Primary Job Role :**

As a Data Analyst Customer Experience, you will play a key role in transforming operational and quality assurance data into actionable insights that drive performance and enhance customer satisfaction. You will analyze data from desk collection activities, customer interactions, and QA evaluations to identify trends, uncover root causes of issues, and recommend improvements. By ensuring data accuracy, building insightful reports and dashboards, and collaborating closely with Operations, QA, and Compliance teams, you will help optimize processes, improve collection effectiveness, and maintain high service and regulatory standards within a fast-paced fintech environment.

**Job Description :**

1. Analyze operational data related to the Operational Department.
2. Monitor and evaluate quality assurance metrics (call quality, compliance, script adherence) to ensure high service standards.
3. Process and clean raw/manual data from Google Sheets & SQL Databases and other internal sources into structured datasets
4. Identify trends, anomalies, and root causes behind customer complaints, low performance, or process inefficiencies
5. Build dashboards and reports to track key metrics such as customer satisfaction & customer behavior.
6. Collaborate with Quality Assurance Operation to provide data-driven recommendations for improving performance and customer experience
7. Support initiatives to improve customer satisfaction while maintaining compliance with fintech regulations
8. Automate recurring reports and streamline data workflows for better efficiency

description:
The Food Strategist is responsible for driving menu strategy and product optimization within the F&B business. This role combines data-driven decision-making, market trend analysis, and brand alignment to develop compelling menu offerings that enhance sales performance and customer experience.

Working under the Marketing Department, the Food Strategist collaborates cross-functionally with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Operations to ensure that menu innovations are commercially viable, operationally efficient, and aligned with the brand’s identity.

**Key Responsibilities:**

1. Menu Strategy & Development

* Develop and propose menu strategies based on sales performance, customer insights, and market trends
* Ensure all menu offerings align with brand DNA and positioning
* Optimize product mix (core items, seasonal offerings, limited-time offers)

2. Sales & Performance Analysis

* Analyze sales data, product performance, and profitability metrics
* Identify high-performing and underperforming items and recommend actions
* Forecast trends and demand for future menu planning

3. Trend & Market Intelligence

* Monitor F&B trends (local and global), consumer preferences, and competitor activity
* Translate insights into actionable menu concepts and campaigns
* Identify opportunities for innovation and differentiation

4. Cross-functional Collaboration

* Work with Product Development to translate concepts into executable menu items
* Coordinate with Supply Chain to ensure ingredient availability and cost efficiency
* Partner with Operations to ensure feasibility and consistency across outlets
* Collaborate with Marketing to support campaigns, launches, and promotions

5. Brand Alignment & Innovation

* Ensure all menu initiatives reflect the brand’s identity, values, and target audience
* Contribute to long-term brand strategy through menu direction
* Lead ideation for seasonal campaigns and new product launches

**Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Hospitality, Culinary Arts, or related field
* 3–5+ years of experience in F&B, merchandising, category management, or menu planning
* Strong analytical background with experience in sales and performance data
* Experience working in cross-functional teams
* Understanding of F&B operations and supply chain dynamics is a plus

**Technical Competencies**

* Data analysis (Excel, Google Sheets, BI tools like Tableau/Power BI)
* Sales forecasting and performance tracking
* Menu engineering and product mix optimization
* Market research and trend analysis
* Basic financial acumen (costing, margins, pricing strategy)
* Project management and stakeholder coordination

**Soft Skills**

* Strategic thinking and commercial mindset
* Strong communication and storytelling ability
* Creativity with a strong sense of brand identity
* Collaboration and stakeholder management
* Problem-solving and decision-making
* Adaptability in a fast-paced F&B environment

description:
Astra Integrasi Digital (AID), part of Astra Financial Group, is a digital intelligence, AI-powered analytics, and connectivity solution provider delivering end-to-end services that accelerate strategic advancement. We help organizations manage, optimize, and leverage their digital intelligence and AI-powered analytics ecosystem to create scalable and reliable solutions. Our capabilities include intelligence management, advanced analytics, AI-powered analytics, connectivity, and customer insight. By combining technology, analytics, artificial intelligence, and industry expertise, AID enables insight-driven decision-making and supports sustainable business growth.

Job Descriptions:

* Analyze business requirements from users/business units and translate them into data analysis approaches.
* Explore and analyze data to identify patterns, trends, and key insights.
* Prepare, manage, and develop datasets and analytical models (data cleaning, transformation, standardization, evaluation, and fine-tuning) according to user needs.
* Deliver insights and recommendations to business units and management to support decision-making.
* Conduct UAT and provide deployment support with users, as well as document analysis results.
* Analyze the prediction accuracy of data models periodically and perform fine-tuning when necessary.
* Design and present informative data visualizations and dashboards tailored to user needs.
* Ensure well-organized administrative documentation and establish standardization for formal rules.

Job Requirements:

* Bachelor’s degree in data science, Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, Statistics, or other related quantitative fields.
* **Strong understanding of machine learning and predictive modeling**
  , with the ability to develop models end-to-end, including data preparation, feature engineering, model development, and evaluation.
* **Proficient in SQL**
  for data extraction, data manipulation, and analysis from multiple data sources.
* **Understanding of Big Data and data warehouse concepts**
  , with the ability to work with large-scale datasets.
* **Able to perform exploratory data analysis (EDA)**
  to understand data characteristics, identify patterns or anomalies, and generate meaningful insights.
* **Basic understanding of Artificial Intelligence / Generative AI (GenAI)**
  and its potential applications to enhance data analysis and productivity.
* **Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills**
  , with the ability to translate business questions into analytical approaches and derive actionable insights.
* Experience in building data visualizations or dashboards using tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or similar platforms is a plus.

description:
**Job Description**

The
**Sr Officer-B2B & HBB Analytic & Insight**
is responsible for transforming large-scale customer, network, service assurance, and operational data into actionable insights that improve customer experience, service quality, operational efficiency, and business performance.

This role work cross-functionally with Network, IT, Commercial, Customer Experience and Operations teams to develop analytical models, predictive insights, and data-driven recommendations leveraging Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AI/ML technologies, and advanced analytics solutions. The outcome will translating technical network insights into strategic improvement initiatives that enhance service quality, reduce customer issues, and strengthen IOH’s competitiveness in the B2B and home broadband market

**Key Responsibilities**

**Customer Experience Analytics**

* Analyze end-to-end customer journey and service experience across B2B and HBB segments.
* Identify key drivers impacting customer satisfaction, churn, complaint volume, service degradation, and customer loyalty.
* Develop customer segmentation and behavioral analysis to support targeted improvement initiatives.
* Monitor and evaluate customer experience KPIs and service quality trends

**Predictive Modeling & AI/ML Development**

* Develop predictive and machine learning models for:
* Customer churn prediction
* Trouble ticket prediction
* Service degradation detection
* Network quality anomaly detection
* Customer satisfaction prediction
* Upsell and retention opportunities
* Utilize Google AI/ML ecosystem including:
* Vertex AI
* BigQuery ML
* AutoML
* Gemini or others AI capabilities
* Develop scalable AI-driven recommendation and prioritization engines to support proactive customer handling and operational improvement.
* Continuously improve model performance, explainability, and operational usability

**Cloud Data Analytics & Engineering**

* Process and analyze large-scale structured and unstructured datasets from multiple sources including:
* CRM
* Network performance systems
* Trouble ticket systems
* NPS/CSAT surveys
* Usage and traffic data
* Service assurance platforms
* Build and maintain scalable cloud-native data pipelines and analytical frameworks using Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Utilize tools such as:
* BigQuery
* Cloud Storage
* Dataflow
* Looker / Looker Studio
* Cloud Functions
* Ensure data quality, consistency, governance, and security compliance.

**Business Insight & Decision Support**

* Translate analytical findings into clear business recommendations and operational actions.
* Support management presentations with insight-driven storytelling and quantitative evidence.
* Develop executive dashboards and automated reporting for customer experience and service quality monitoring.

**Operational & Service Quality Improvement**

* Identify service quality gaps and operational inefficiencies through advanced analytics.
* Support root cause analysis for customer complaints, network degradation, and service instability.
* Develop proactive monitoring frameworks and early warning systems for customer experience risks.
* Support continuous improvement initiatives and customer experience transformation programs.

**Collaboration & Innovation**

* Work closely with Network, IT, Commercial, Customer Experience and Operations teams to operationalize data-driven initiatives.
* Promote adoption of cloud analytics, AI/ML, and automation capabilities across the organization.
* Explore innovative use cases leveraging Google ecosystem technologies and Generative AI solutions for customer experience enhancement.

**Strategic Reporting & Executive Insights**

* Develop executive-level reporting on B2B & HBB customer experience performance and improvement opportunities.
* Present insights and recommendations to senior leadership including VP, SVP and CTO organizations.
* Provide strategic analysis on how B2B & HBB experience improvements contribute to:
* customer satisfaction
* reduction of service complaints and trouble tickets
* potential area for development

**Minimum Requirements**

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Telecommunications Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information System or related field.
* Master’s Degree is advantage

**Experience:**

* Minimum 3-5 years experience in Data Science, Machine Learning, Customer Analytic, Business Intelligence.
* Experience working with Google Cloud Platform (GCP)-based analytics ecosystem is highly preferred.
* Experience in telecommunications, ISP, broadband, or digital service industries is strongly preferred.
* Experience handling large-scale customer and operational datasets is preferred

**Job Description**
Digital Insights & Reporting Lead bertanggung jawab dalam menyediakan analisis berbasis data, monitoring performa digital, serta menghasilkan insight yang dapat digunakan untuk pengambilan keputusan strategis.
  
  
Peran ini memastikan seluruh data digital tidak hanya dilaporkan, tetapi diterjemahkan menjadi rekomendasi yang actionable untuk mendorong pertumbuhan dan perbaikan kinerja.
  
  
Selain itu, posisi ini berperan sebagai data owner dari sisi bisnis, yang memastikan data yang digunakan akurat, relevan, dan dapat dipercaya untuk kebutuhan manajemen.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Performance Monitoring & Reporting
* Mengelola monitoring KPI digital secara harian, mingguan, dan bulanan
* Menyusun dashboard dan laporan performa yang akurat dan mudah dipahami
* Memastikan konsistensi data antar sumber (single source of truth)
* Insight Generation & Analysis
* Mengidentifikasi tren, pola, dan anomaly dari data
* Menghasilkan insight yang actionable (bukan hanya descriptive)
* Menjawab pertanyaan bisnis melalui analisis berbasis data
* Decision Support & Business Partnering
* Memberikan rekomendasi berbasis data kepada manajemen
* Mendukung tim Growth, Performance, dan CX dalam pengambilan keputusan
* Berperan sebagai partner strategis, bukan hanya penyedia laporan
* Data Governance & Quality Control
* Memastikan kualitas, validitas, dan konsistensi data
* Mengidentifikasi mismatch atau anomaly data
* Melakukan validasi data lintas sistem (misalnya transaksi vs laporan)
* Data & System Collaboration
* Berkolaborasi dengan tim Data Engineer / IT dalam pengelolaan data
* Mendefinisikan kebutuhan data untuk kebutuhan bisnis
* Memastikan data tersedia dan siap digunakan untuk analisis

description:
**Role Purpose:**

The primary purpose of this role is to lead the design and implementation of organizational structures and frameworks that align with the company's strategic objectives. This role is responsible for conducting organizational assessments, developing effective structural models, executing job evaluations, and maintaining a job architecture that reflects the most current organizational structure. The position provides data-driven recommendations to improve organizational effectiveness and workforce productivity. The AVP Organization Design partners closely with HR Business Partners, senior business leaders, and the broader HR community to ensure that the organization is structured to efficiently achieve its mission and goals, while maintaining a consistent, equitable, and up-to-date job grading framework

**Job Description**

Organizational Structure Design

* Analyze and evaluate current organizational structures across business units to identify design opportunities and inefficiencies.
* Develop and recommend organizational models and reporting structures that support business strategy and operational efficiency.
* Collaborate with HRBPs and business leaders to implement structural changes with minimal disruption.
* Maintain updated organizational charts and structural documentation for all divisions.
* Conduct benchmarking against industry best practices and peer organizations to inform design recommendations.

Job Evaluation & Job Architecture

* Conduct job evaluations using a reliable job evaluation methodology (e.g., Hay, Mercer, or internal framework) to determine appropriate job grades across the organization.
* Develop, maintain, and continuously update the company's job architecture, including job families, job levels, and career streams, ensuring alignment with the most current and approved organizational structure.
* Ensure job architecture and grading decisions are consistent, equitable, and aligned with external market benchmarks and internal pay structures.
* Review and update job grades whenever structural changes, role expansions, or new position creations occur to reflect the latest organizational design.
* Collaborate with Reward, HR Policy, and HR Business Partners to integrate job architecture into compensation frameworks, career ladders, and talent management processes.
* Provide guidance to HRBPs and business leaders on proper job scoping, titling conventions, and grade determination for new or revised roles.
* Maintain a centralized job catalogue and ensure all positions are properly documented, classified, and aligned with the current org structure.
* Conduct periodic audits of job grades and role classifications to identify misalignments and recommend corrective actions.

Organizational Assessment & Analytics

* Conduct regular organizational assessments and diagnostics to evaluate structural effectiveness, spans of control, and layering.
* Develop and maintain organizational analytics dashboards and statistical reports.
* Analyze workforce data to identify trends, risks, and opportunities for organizational improvement.
* Support assessment and analysis aligns with strategic goals and present findings to senior leadership.
* Leverage data and analytics to provide actionable insights for decision-making.

Total Rewards

* Develop scenario and analyze complex data into compelling narratives and visualizations to support the design and implementation of total rewards programs including its financial impact.
* Ensure the accurate calculation and validation of total rewards programs, including—but not limited to—salary reviews, adjustments, short-term and long-term incentives, as well as allowances and benefits.
* Manage data submission for external salary surveys, analyze survey results and establish internal benchmarks to evaluate market competitiveness and inform effective pay positioning strategies.
* Assess the effectiveness, utilization, and alignment of current total rewards programs to ensure they support the organization's objectives and strengthen the employee value proposition.
* Provide data-driven insights and actionable recommendation to support the continuous improvement, enhancement, and policy development of total rewards programs.

**Qualification**

Related Experience:

* Minimum 5 years of professional experience in organizational design, workforce planning, or a related HR function within a complex organization.
* Proven track record in designing and implementing organizational structures.
* Experience in managing cross-functional coordination with HR Business Partners and business leaders.
* Experience with large-scale organizational transformation projects is an advantage.
* Experienced in managing the annual compensation cycle end-to-end.
* Experienced in utilizing salary survey tools such as Mercer, WTW, Korn Ferry, Aon, etc.

description:
**Role Purpose:**

Capability Building focuses on enhancing employees' abilities, while Reward Management ensures that those enhanced abilities are recognized and compensated. Both are integral in creating a high-performance culture where employees are continually developing and feel motivated by both monetary and non-monetary rewards.

This role specifically requires a deep understanding of field sales operations at Indosat Ooredoo Hutchison (IOH), enabling the postholder to bridge the gap between on-ground realities and system/capability solutions that support the sales team.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Sales System Analysis & Improvement**

* Conduct in-depth analysis of existing systems used by the sales team in the field (e.g. retailer apps, sales force tools, reporting platforms)
* Identify system gaps, pain points, and inefficiencies based on field experience and direct engagement with sales team users
* Translate field findings into structured system improvement proposals and feature requirements
* Collaborate with Digital/IT and system solution partners to prioritize and implement enhancements
* Monitor adoption and effectiveness of system updates post-implementation

**Sales Capability Building (L&D)**

* Design and develop training modules covering both system usage and sales competencies
* Build Train the Trainer programs to cascade capability at scale across field teams
* Develop Corporate Competencies through New Leadership Competency frameworks
* Align L&D programs with actual field sales challenges and system workflows

**Reward Management**

* Design programs that motivate the sales team to achieve highest potential
* Develop a comprehensive reward system that attracts, motivates, and retains top talent
* Leverage system data to ensure reward programs are tied to measurable field performance

**Qualification:**

* Bachelor's degree in Telecommunications, Computer Science, Information Systems, or Programming
* Analytical thinking and understanding of telco business & digitalization principles
* Willing to work hard and collaborate effectively as a team
* Target & result oriented, with good teamwork and passion for data discoveries
* Self-driven and high achiever mentality to drive high-performing teams
* Adaptability: able to handle current situations and adjust to new challenges
* Learning Mindset: agile in adopting new methods & technology for improvement

**Related Experience:**

* Minimum 2 years of direct Sales experience at IOH (field sales, channel sales, or distribution sales)
* 2 years of experience in capability building and developing people
* Experience in building programs, training/module materials derived from stakeholder requirements and business needs
* Experience in system development and partnership management

**Skills**

* Analytical and problem-solving skills related to retailer apps
* Ability to design retailer app architecture and plan future development
* Translate stakeholder requirements into system solutions
* Understanding of IOH sales tools and systems used in field operations
* AI operating skill to support daily working

description:
**Job Summary**

This position acts as a key enabler of HR Business Partner effectiveness by supporting the delivery of people strategies, workforce initiatives, and organizational priorities. Working across multiple business functions, the role ensures that both operational HR processes and strategic HR projects are executed efficiently, consistently, and in alignment with organizational goals. The role provides end-to-end support across the employee lifecycle, including workforce planning, talent management, employee movements, organizational changes, and HR governance activities. Through effective stakeholder collaboration, data-driven insights, and operational excellence, this position helps drive workforce readiness, strengthen people processes, and enable the successful implementation of HR initiatives that support business performance and organizational growth.

**Job Description**

**Workforce Planning & Organization Readiness**

* Support workforce planning, headcount management, and organizational readiness initiatives to ensure alignment between workforce capacity and business priorities

**Talent Management & Employee Lifecycle**

* Facilitate talent processes including recruitment, employee movement, promotions, contract management, and other employee lifecycle activities

**HR Governance & Compliance**

* Ensure workforce actions, employment practices, and people decisions comply with company policies, governance standards, and regulatory requirements

**People Analytics & Workforce Insights**

* Generate, analyze, and interpret workforce data to support decision-making and identify people-related risks and opportunities

**HR Project & Initiative Support**

* Support the planning, coordination, and execution of strategic HR initiatives and cross-functional projects

**Stakeholder Partnership & HR Operations Excellence**

* Partner with HRBPs, managers, and employees to ensure effective delivery of HR services while continuously improving processes and employee experience

**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources, Psychology, Business Administration, Management, or related field.
* 2–4 years of experience as HRBP, HR Shared Services, or related HR functions.
* Understanding of employee lifecycle management, talent processes, workforce planning, and HR policies and procedures.
* Basic understanding of employment laws and labor regulations relevant to workforce administration and compliance.
* Proficient in Microsoft Office (especially Excel and PowerPoint) and HRIS platforms.
* Experience in preparing HR reports, workforce data analysis, and dashboard monitoring is preferred.
* Experience supporting HR projects, organizational initiatives, or process improvement activities is an advantage.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills with the ability to collaborate across multiple stakeholders.

description:
**BE A PART OF A REVOLUTIONARY CHANGE!**
At PMI, we’ve chosen to do something incredible. We’re totally transforming our business and building our future on one clear purpose – to deliver a smoke-free future.
  
  
With huge change, comes huge opportunity. So, wherever you join us, you’ll enjoy the freedom to dream up and deliver better, brighter solutions and the space to move your career forward in endlessly different directions.
  
  
Wherever you join our crucial 47,000-strong Operations team, you’ll have the opportunity to make an impact. PMI’s shift from selling cigarettes to our new smoke-free products has changed the way we work. New products bring new challenges – in the way we source and buy raw materials, in the way we engineer and manufacture, and in our supply chain planning.
  
  
Bring us your curiosity and a desire to challenge the everyday and we’ll give you lots of responsibility. You’ll help us improve, inject innovation and create new ways of working. You’ll be solving supply chain problems that span the whole world: a smoke-free world.
  
  
**YOUR "DAY-TO-DAY"**
This role supports operational planning and performance management within the manufacturing and factory controlling environment. The position plays a key role in ensuring that
*plans, data, and execution*
are
*aligned to business objectives*
by providing
*analytical support, coordination, and structured insights*
to stakeholders across functions.
  
  
The role is suitable for candidates with strong analytical capability, planning discipline, and the ability to work cross‑functionally in a structured manufacturing setting.
  
  
**Key Accountabilities**

* Support operational and business planning processes across manufacturing activities
* Consolidate, analyze, and interpret operational, financial, and performance data to support management decision‑making
* Monitor plans versus actuals, identify gaps or risks, and support follow‑up actions
* Coordinate with cross‑functional teams to ensure alignment on assumptions, priorities, and timelines
* Prepare regular management reports, dashboards, and materials for reviews and governance forums
* Support continuous improvement initiatives through analysis, standardization, and process discipline
* Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and adherence to established control and governance frameworks

**Who We're Looking For**

* Minimum Bachelor Degree in Industrial Engineering or Finance/Economics/Accounting or relevant skills through demonstrated experience (open for Fresh Graduate)
* Having 1-2 years of relevant experience in multinational company would be beneficial
* Fluent both in English and Bahasa Indonesia in both speaking and written
* Have strong communication & interpersonal skills and have attention to detail
* Agile and innovative in problem solving
* Advanced knowledge in Excel
* Has knowledge in GMRB and SAP would be preferable
* Have good analytical skills - data interpretation, business acumen, and business partnering
* Willing to go on business trip and to be located in all HM Sampoerna plants.

**What We Offer**
Our success depends on our talented employees who come to work here every single day with a sense of purpose and an appetite for progress. Join PMI and you too can:
  
  

* Seize the freedom to define your future and ours. We’ll empower you to take risks, experiment and explore.
* Be part of an inclusive, diverse culture, where everyone’s contribution is respected; collaborate with some of the world’s best people and feel like you belong.
* Pursue your ambitions and develop your skills with a global business – our staggering size and scale provides endless opportunities to progress.
* Take pride in delivering our promise to society: to deliver a smoke-free future.

To join our growing team…
  
  
#Sampoerna

description:
**Key Areas of Responsibilities**

- Market and Industry Research

* Collect, analyze, and interpret data on local and regional markets, industries, and economic trends.
* Conduct primary and secondary research to gather relevant information for reports and presentations.

- Data Analysis and Management

* Use various tools to process large datasets, identify patterns, and generate insights.
* Maintain and update databases, financial models, and research databases for accuracy and relevance.

- Financial Modeling and Valuation

* Assist in building and updating financial models to project company performance and valuation.
* Support senior analysts in conducting company and sector valuations using various methodologies.

- Report Preparation and Presentation

* Draft and assist in preparing research reports, industry briefs, and company snapshots.
* Create visual aids such as charts and tables to enhance report clarity and impact.

- Monitoring and Tracking News

* Stay updated with the latest news, earnings releases, and market developments relevant to Indonesia and ASEAN markets.
* Summarize key updates and notify the team of significant events.

- Support for Client Communications

* Help prepare presentation materials, pitch decks, and client updates.
* Respond to client inquiries by providing relevant data and insights.

- Collaboration with Other Departments

* Coordinate with sales, trading, and corporate teams to align research outputs with business needs.
* Participate in internal meetings to discuss research findings and strategy.

- Compliance and Data Confidentiality

* Ensure all research activities adhere to regulatory guidelines and company policies.
* Maintain strict confidentiality of sensitive information.

- Continuous Learning and Development

* Keep abreast of industry best practices, new research tools, and market developments.
* Attend relevant training sessions and contribute to knowledge sharing within the team.

- Administrative Tasks

* Maintain organized files of research reports, data, and references.
* Assist in scheduling meetings and managing research-related documentation.

**Requirements**

* Bachelor degree or above in business related discipline, preferably with finance and/or accounting major – from reputable foreign or local universities
* Minimum of 1 year relevant experience
* Strong analytical skills
* Strong financial modelling and Excel/ spreadsheet skills
* Excellent interpersonal sensitivity
* High sense of commercial awareness
* Excellent communication, relationship and management skills to both internal and external clients
* Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia and English

description:
**Job Description**
**We are seeking a highly technical Business Intelligence Engineer to design, build, and maintain the data infrastructure that powers our analytics. You will be responsible for developing scalable data pipelines, building robust data models, and optimizing our data warehouse. Your work will be the foundation that enables our BI Analysts and business leaders to access clean, reliable, and performant data for their insights and decision-making.**
****Job Description****

* Design, build, and maintain scalable and reliable ETL/ELT pipelines to process data from diverse sources for any reporting use cases.
* Develop and manage robust, reusable data models within our data warehouse (BigQuery) using data modeling best practices (star schemas, etc.).
* Write, optimize, and productionize complex SQL and Python scripts for data transformation, cleaning, and validation to ensure data integrity.
* Create and manage optimized data marts and summary tables that support the specific needs of our BI Analysts and visualization tools.
* Collaborate with BI Analysts and business stakeholders to understand their data requirements and translate them into technical specifications for the data backend.
* Monitor, debug, and optimize data pipeline performance, query speeds, and data warehouse health.
* Implement data quality checks and governance processes to ensure all data is accurate, consistent, and trustworthy.

Qualifications
  
  

* Having a bachelor's or master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Expert-level SQL skills, with the proven ability to write highly optimized advanced queries, stored procedures, and window functions on large-scale data.
* Capable of coding with data processing tools are a major plus (e.g., Jupyter, Python).
* Deep understanding of data modeling and data warehouse design principles (e.g., dimensional modeling, star schemas) to build efficient data backends.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to debug complex data pipelines, optimize query performance, and troubleshoot data integrity issues.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills to collaborate with BI Analysts and business stakeholders to translate their requirements into technical specifications.
* Experience with modern data stack tools is a plus (e.g., dbt, Airflow, AWS Glue, Azure Data Factory, or other data orchestration tools).

description:
**About Amartha**
Amartha is a technology company focused on creating shared prosperity by developing digital financial solutions for the grassroots economy. Founded in 2010 as a microfinance institution, Amartha connects rural, women-led micro-enterprises with affordable capital. Today, Amartha is expanding as a tech company, building a microfinance ecosystem that connects to the growing digital economy through capital, investment, and payment services. By boosting the competitiveness of micro and small entrepreneurs, Amartha empowers women-led MSMEs, creates jobs, and fosters inclusive economic growth.
  
  
**About The Team**
Amartha is actively expanding its digital risk management team as part of our strategic focus on digital transformation in 2026. We are looking to strengthen our capabilities in managing digital lending risks to support our growing portfolio of digital financial products. To this end, we are currently seeking a talented individual to join our team as Credit Risk Intern. This role will play an essential role to support the digital risk management team in providing accurate and timely credit risk portfolio reports, ensuring that we continue to provide secure and effective financial solutions to our customers while mitigating potential risks in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.
  
  
**Roles And Responsibilities**

* Provide and update regular credit risk reports to ensure portfolio monitoring and management performed effectively
* Support the risk analyst with data and/or analysis to support regular or adhoc portfolio deep dive
* Assess any changes in business strategy and overall processes to determine the impact to credit performance while proposing necessary actions to manage the risk if necessary
* Working with other teams to manage risk-related projects including projects with 3rd parties, while keeping user journey and needs in mind
* Conduct quantitative and qualitative analysis either planned or on an ad hoc basis, alone or with a data team, to answer credit risk issues

**Requirements**

* Pursuing Bachelor's Degree in quantitative field such as Statistics/Math/Finance/Business Management in 3rd or 4th year of study
* Experienced in creating senior-level presentations materials, and complex, yet clear reports
* ⁠Proficient in data manipulation and analysis using Google Sheets (Excel) and SQL
* Python skills would be considered a plus
* Fluent in both Bahasa Indonesia and English

*At Amartha, we are dedicated to creating a workplace that celebrates diversity, ensures equity, and fosters inclusion. We believe that diverse perspectives—shaped by factors such as gender, age, race, ethnicity, education, culture, and life experiences—drive innovation and growth.*
*We actively welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us in building an environment where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered. Our commitment is to provide equal opportunities and foster a sense of belonging that enables our employees to thrive and make meaningful contributions.*

description:
**About Amartha**
At Amartha, we empower micro-businesses across Indonesia, enabling growth and equal prosperity. We've supported over 2.7 million entrepreneurs—mostly women—by disbursing IDR 22.8 trillion in funding. As we step into 2025, Amartha is evolving into a technology-driven financial ecosystem, expanding our reach in lending, funding, and payments. Through innovation and digital solutions, we aim to enhance accessibility, streamline processes, and create a seamless user experience.
  
  
**About The Team**
As a Collection Recovery team, We sit at the heart of Amartha's mission: ensuring the sustainability of our lending ecosystem so that more micro-entrepreneurs can access the capital they need to grow. We are a team of passionate, data-driven, and impact-focused professionals who believe that great collection is not just about recovering numbers — it is about finding the right solutions for borrowers while protecting the health of our portfolio.
  
  
**About The Role**
We are looking for a Collection MIS and Data Analytics who will serve as the analytical backbone of our collection operations. In this role, you will be responsible for turning complex collection data into clear, actionable insights that drive strategic decisions, improve recovery rates, and optimize the effectiveness of our collection treatments.
  
  
This is not just a reporting role. We are looking for someone who is curious, proactive, and commercially minded — someone who does not just present numbers but tells the story behind them and recommends what to do next.
  
  
**Job Description**

* Build and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly collection performance reports (payment rate, contact rate, PTP conversion, DPD bucket movement)
* Monitor the performance of all collection treatment channels — WhatsApp Blast, IVR, Desk Collection, Home Visit, and BP Recovery — and proactively flag anomalies and trends
* Conduct deep-dive analysis on delinquency trends, DPD migration, flow rates, and borrower payment behavior
* Perform pre- and post-initiative impact analysis to measure effectiveness of new collection strategies
* Support lever sizing and impact quantification to help the team prioritize high-recovery initiatives
* Develop borrower segmentation frameworks to support targeted treatment design across all channels and DPD buckets
* Consolidate and validate collection data from multiple sources including field apps, core systems, and third-party platforms
* Conduct regular data quality audits and escalate discrepancies promptly
* Respond to ad-hoc analytical requests from internal stakeholders within agreed timelines
* Present findings and recommendations clearly to both operational teams and senior management

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, Information Systems, Economics, or a related quantitative field
* Minimum 2-4 years of experience in a data analyst role, preferably in financial services, fintech, or collection/credit operations
* Strong proficiency in SQL, Excel/Google Sheets (advanced), and visualization/analytics tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or Python
* Familiarity with collection management systems or lending applications is a plus
* Strong understanding of collections operations, portfolio management, delinquency metrics, and lending business processes
* Strong analytical thinking with the ability to draw meaningful conclusions from large datasets
* Able to communicate complex data clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving capability, and attention to detail
* Comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
* Proactive, collaborative, and solutions-oriented
* Experience working cross-functionally with business, operations, risk, and data teams in fast-paced environments

*At Amartha, we are dedicated to creating a workplace that celebrates diversity, ensures equity, and fosters inclusion. We believe that diverse perspectives—shaped by factors such as gender, age, race, ethnicity, education, culture, and life experiences—drive innovation and growth.*
*We actively welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us in building an environment where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered. Our commitment is to provide equal opportunities and foster a sense of belonging that enables our employees to thrive and make meaningful contributions.*

description:
**About Amartha**
Amartha is a technology company focused on creating shared prosperity by developing digital financial solutions for the grassroots economy. Founded in 2010 as a microfinance institution, Amartha connects rural, women-led micro-enterprises with affordable capital. Amartha is expanding as a tech company, building a microfinance ecosystem that connects to the growing digital economy through capital, investment, and payment services. By boosting the competitiveness of micro and small entrepreneurs, Amartha empowers women-led MSMEs, creates jobs, and fosters inclusive economic growth.
  
  
**About The Team**
The Fraud Prevention team plays a critical role in protecting Amartha's lending ecosystem by proactively identifying, analyzing, and mitigating fraud risks across the portfolio. The team works closely with Risk, Operations, Collection, and Field teams to monitor abnormal patterns, strengthen fraud controls, and ensure healthy portfolio quality. By leveraging data-driven insights and collaborative investigation processes, the team helps maintain sustainable business growth while safeguarding customers and operational integrity.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Proactively monitor lending portfolio performance to identify early signs of fraud, abnormal behaviors, and suspicious patterns before they escalate into massive issues
* Analyze repayment trends, customer behavior, branch performance, and operational anomalies to detect potential fraud risks and emerging fraud schemes
* Develop and maintain fraud monitoring indicators, early warning triggers, and watchlist mechanisms for high-risk branches, customers, or activities
* Collaborate with Operations, Risk, Collection, and Field Teams to validate findings and implement preventive actions to mitigate fraud exposure
* Prepare fraud risk analysis, insights, and recommendations for management to strengthen fraud prevention controls and improve portfolio quality

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Business, Economics, or related fields
* Minimum 1-3 years of experience in Fraud Prevention, Risk Management, Portfolio
* Monitoring, Collection Strategy, or Lending Analytics
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to identify abnormal patterns, portfolio anomalies, and potential fraud indicators
* Proficient in Microsoft Excel/Google Sheets and data analysis; experience with SQL, BI tools, or dashboard monitoring is an advantage
* Good understanding of lending operations, portfolio quality metrics, repayment behavior, and fraud risk within lending businesses
* Strong communication and problem-solving skills with the ability to coordinate across multiple teams
* Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to work under tight timelines in a fast-paced environment
* Ability to translate data findings into actionable fraud prevention recommendations and business insights

*At Amartha, we are dedicated to creating a workplace that celebrates diversity, ensures equity, and fosters inclusion. We believe that diverse perspectives—shaped by factors such as gender, age, race, ethnicity, education, culture, and life experiences—drive innovation and growth.*
*We actively welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us in building an environment where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered. Our commitment is to provide equal opportunities and foster a sense of belonging that enables our employees to thrive and make meaningful contributions.*

description:
**Who are we?**
Amar Bank is one of the most technologically advanced digital banks in Indonesia. Our leading
  
  
digital lending product, Tunaiku has the distinction of being the first FinTech product in
  
  
Indonesia. We are also the first digital bank on the cloud. As the first profitable digital bank, we
  
  
managed to get listed on the Indonesian Stock Exchange.
  
  
**How did we manage to do that?**
We are changing people’s perception of a bank. We believe we are the innovators who combine
  
  
customer focus principles with creating technology-based impact. We incorporate freedom and
  
  
flexibility as part of our startup working culture DNA to encourage innovation in creating better
  
  
financial solutions for the banking industry. We think of ourselves as, ‘A technology company
  
  
with a banking license’. For this reason, we ‘Act like a FinTech, and think like a Bank.’
  
  
**How did it all start?**
Founded on March 15, 1991, in Surabaya as PT Anglomas International Bank (Amin Bank), the
  
  
bank was acquired by Tolaram Group and transformed to PT Bank Amar Indonesia (Amar Bank)
  
  
in 2014. It has then undergone a significant digital transformation to become one of the
  
  
country's forerunning fintech institutions through its award-winning digital lending platform,
  
  
Tunaiku.
  
  
**Our philosophy, mission, and vision**
Technology must impact lives, must improve lives. We exist to provide banking to those who
  
  
‘need’ and not only to those who ‘want’. Services when provided to those who need at the time
  
  
of their need brings smiles. Our vision is to bring 200 million smiles.
  
  
**More About The Bank With Startup Culture Environment**
Consist of 1000+ people, you will meet people who love to grow, dream big, and actually have
  
  
fun at the workplace! We provide a great working environment that pushes people to grow
  
  
outside their comfort zone. People with high drive and ambition find us a very attractive place to
  
  
work as their career growth matches their own drive and not any staid policies. Thus we hold
  
  
the honor of being awarded “Best Place to Work in Indonesia”.
  
  
Recently Amar Bank was awarded as Inspirational Brand from APEA (Asia Pacific Enterprise
  
  
Awards) 2022. Of course, our innovation won't stop here. So if you would love to be a part of it,
  
  
have a growth mindset, and are constantly hungry for challenges, we invite you to join us in our
  
  
journey to ‘Impact Lives’.
  
  
**Join us today and create #unlimitedinnovations!**
**Responsibilities**

* Establish Amar Bank Identity, Privilege, and Access management capabilities.
* Form the team, procedure, process, and technology for IAM/PAM.
* Establish a Bank-wide User Access Matrix as an access baseline
* Manage day-to-day and end-to-end processes of access requests.
* Conduct access reviews for all internal systems.
* Ensure smooth integration and organization-wide adoption of secure IAM/PAM.
* Monitor asset management lists to ensure onboarding to IAM processes.
* Prepare all reports related to Identity, Privilege, and Access management tasks.

**Requirements**

* Experience: Minimum 5 years in banking or financial services, specifically in IAM
* Technical Knowledge: Strong understanding of Identity, Privilege, and Access management concepts and technologies.
* Implementation: Capability to design and lead IAM/PAM implementation without fully relying on enterprise solutions
* Broad Tech Skills: Understanding of Cloud Platforms, SaaS, Servers, and Network devices
* Soft Skills: Strong communication, ability to work independently, and attention to detail for documentation/evidence.

We exist to innovate and maintain the architecture of Amar Bank's products. As part of our main focus to create through technology we ensure the process and technology we use helps maintain and build human connection at scale.
  
  
It’s our job to plan, monitor, and control the technology growth so we can provide a faster, more convenient, and more efficient way of performing business transactions.
  
  
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

description:
****Logistics Junior Officer****
**About The Role**
Blibli is transforming into a future-ready digital ecosystem where speed, reliability, and customer experience define operational excellence. Within our Logistics team, the Express function plays a critical role in managing courier performance and ensuring seamless last-mile delivery across Indonesia.
  
  
As an
**Logistics**
**Junior Officer**
, you will focus on vendor performance management, logistics data analysis, and operational execution to improve delivery speed, reduce complaints, and strengthen customer satisfaction. You will work closely with courier partners, warehouse teams, and cross-functional stakeholders to ensure daily operations run effectively while continuously identifying opportunities for improvement.
  
  
**What You’ll Do**

* Analyze large volumes of logistics and delivery data to evaluate courier performance and identify improvement opportunities.
* Lead regular performance review meetings with logistics providers, sellers, and internal teams to improve SLA achievement and customer delivery experience.
* Coordinate transportation requirements and logistics provider scheduling to optimize warehouse and line haul operations.
* Develop dashboards and operational reports to monitor order performance and drive data-based decisions.
* Escalate operational risks, negotiate solutions with courier partners, and collaborate cross-functionally with Warehouse, Commercial, CS, and Product teams.
* Monitor vendor capacity (volume & coverage area) and recommend strategies to optimize allocation.
* Investigate root causes of delivery issues affecting large customer volumes and drive corrective actions.
* Contribute to new business strategies, process improvements, and system enhancements (including Kaizen initiatives).
* Ensure adherence to SOP, SLA, and KPI standards, escalating deviations to management when necessary.

****What You’ll Bring to the Team****

* Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Engineering, Business, or related field.
* 1-3 Years of working experience (Experience in courier, logistics, or vendor management industry is highly preferred).
* Strong understanding of logistics operations and courier performance metrics.
* Proven ability to manage vendor communication and performance review processes.
* Strong analytical capability with proficiency in Excel and data reporting.
* Good communication and negotiation skills when engaging with partners and internal stakeholders.
* Able to handle both operational-level coordination and business-level performance discussions (level dependent).

****Why You’ll Love Working Here****
This role offers hands-on exposure to courier vendor management and real-time logistics execution in a fast-paced environment. If you understand how the courier industry works and enjoy turning operational data into performance improvements, this is your opportunity to grow in a critical, high-impact function as we continue growth — transforming together.

description:
**Responsibilities**

* Design and implement data models and machine learning algorithms to detect and prevent fraudulent behavior across IT systems, transactions, and user activities.
* Analyze large-scale datasets from logs, identify systems, network security, and endpoint telemetry to identify anomalies and fraud patterns.
* Develop and maintain fraud risk scoring mechanisms and automated alerting systems to translate fraud indicators into actionable intelligence and policies.
* Create dashboards and visualizations to communicate fraud trends, incident metrics, and model performance to stakeholders and auditors.
* Support regulatory compliance efforts (e.g., ISO 27001, NIST, GDPR) by providing evidence of control effectiveness and data-driven risk assessments.
* Conduct post-incident reviews using forensic data to improve detection and prevention frameworks.

**Requirements**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.
* 3+ years of experience in data science, fraud analytics, or cyber threat detection, ideally in a regulated or high-risk environment.
* Proficiency in Python, R, or similar languages for statistical modeling and machine learning.
* Experience with tools such as SQL, Spark, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or similar tools.
* Familiarity with security data formats (e.g., syslogs, JSON, NetFlow) and SIEM platforms (e.g., Splunk, QRadar, ELK).
* Solid understanding of cybersecurity principles, fraud vectors, and control frameworks (e.g., NIST CSF, ISO 27001, COBIT).
* Strong knowledge of anomaly detection, supervised and unsupervised learning, and time-series analysis.
* Ability to communicate technical findings to non-technical stakeholders effectively.
* Strong critical thinking, problem-solving, and statistical analysis capabilities.
* Understanding of threat modeling, risk tolerance, and mitigation strategies.
* Ability to work cross-functionally with the GRC team, compliance, and engineering teams.
* Able to present complex insights in a clear, concise manner tailored to different audiences.

description:
Blibli is on a journey to become Indonesia’s #1 e-commerce platform — built on trust, innovation, and care. We’re creating better experiences for customers and sellers through technology, collaboration, and a deep commitment to quality. Here, every idea matters, and every action helps us grow stronger together.
  
  
In Commercial, you’ll help connect customers with the products and partners they love. Your work supports category growth, strengthens seller relationships, and creates shopping experiences that are seamless, memorable, and keep customers coming back to Blibli. Data is at the heart of every strategic decision we make. As we continue to scale and refine our products and operations, we rely on accurate insights, strong analysis, and thoughtful recommendations to move the business forward.
  
  
As a Data Analyst, you’ll play a key role in supporting cross‑functional teams with actionable insights. You’ll transform raw data into meaningful stories, uncover trends that influence product and business decisions, and ensure high data accuracy for reporting and analytics. Your work will help strengthen our data‑driven culture and empower teams to make smarter, faster decisions.
  
  
What We’ll Work on Together
  
  

* Analyze and interpret data to support product, operational, and business decisions across multiple teams.
* Build, clean, and maintain datasets and data models, ensuring accuracy, structure, and reliability for analysis and reporting.
* Develop dashboards and reports using tools like Looker Studio, Tableau, and Google Data Studio to communicate key performance metrics.
* Conduct A/B testing and experiment analysis to evaluate product performance and recommend improvements.
* Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies to uncover opportunities and potential risks.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business questions, translate them into analytical requirements, and present insights clearly.
* Contribute to a data‑driven culture by sharing best practices, documenting methodologies, and improving analytics workflows.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Statistics, or a related quantitative field.
* 2+ years of experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar analytics role.
* Proficient in A/B Testing, BigQuery, Data Modeling, Data Cleaning, Visualization, and tracking tools such as Datatracker.
* Strong skills in Looker Studio / Google Data Studio, Google Analytics, Tableau, Excel, and PowerPoint.
* Solid understanding of statistics, experiment design, and data interpretation.
* Certification in Google Analytics, Tableau, or Looker Studio is a plus.
* Prior experience or knowledge of search or recommendation systems is preferred.

We believe growth happens where people feel safe to share, fail, and try again. Here, you’ll find teammates who push you to do better, not harder — and leaders who listen before they lead. Whether you’re learning something new or teaching what you know, there’s always room to grow together.
