description:
Who are we?
  
  
Amar Bank is one of the most technologically advanced digital banks in Indonesia. Our leading digital lending product, Tunaiku has the distinction of being the first FinTech product in Indonesia. We are also the first digital bank on the cloud. As the first profitable digital bank, we managed to get listed on the Indonesian Stock Exchange.
  
  
How did we manage to do that?
  
  
We are changing people’s perception of a bank. We believe we are the innovators who combine customer focus principles with creating technology-based impact. We incorporate freedom and flexibility as part of our startup working culture DNA to encourage innovation in creating better financial solutions for the banking industry. We think of ourselves as, ‘A technology company with a banking license’. For this reason, we ‘Act like a FinTech, and think like a Bank.’
  
  
How did it all start?
  
  
Founded on March 15, 1991, in Surabaya as PT Anglomas International Bank (Amin Bank), the bank was acquired by Tolaram Group and transformed to PT Bank Amar Indonesia (Amar Bank) in 2014. It has then undergone a significant digital transformation to become one of the country's forerunning fintech institutions through its award-winning digital lending platform, Tunaiku.
  
  
Our philosophy, mission, and vision
  
  
Technology must impact lives, must improve lives. We exist to provide banking to those who ‘need’ and not only to those who ‘want’. Services when provided to those who need at the time of their need brings smiles. Our vision is to bring 200 million smiles.
  
  
More about the bank with startup culture environment
  
  
Consist of 1000+ people, you will meet people who love to grow, dream big, and actually have fun at the workplace! We provide a great working environment that pushes people to grow outside their comfort zone. People with high drive and ambition find us a very attractive place to work as their career growth matches their own drive and not any staid policies. Thus we hold the honor of being awarded “Best Place to Work in Indonesia”.Recently Amar Bank was awarded as Inspirational Brand from APEA (Asia Pacific Enterprise Awards) 2022. Of course, our innovation won't stop here. So if you would love to be a part of it, have a growth mindset, and are constantly hungry for challenges, we invite you to join us in our journey to ‘Impact Lives’.
  
  
Join us today and create #unlimitedinnovations!

description:
**Job Summary**
Ownership for monitoring inventory levels, traceability, and identifying, classifying, and finding the root causes of inventory inaccuracies. Give feedback and possible solutions to manager for eliminating further discrepancies.
  
  
**Essential Duties And Responsibilities**

* Responsible for monitoring all material transactions for assigned area(s).
* Responsible for identifying, resolving, and finding the root cause of discrepancies and other related inventory errors.
* Recommend changes that will eliminate or greatly reduce future inaccuracies from reoccurring.
* Be flexible enough to work overtime, assist in material handling functions, and fill in for other Inventory Control personnel as required and as specified by the Inventory Control Manager.
* Responsible for eliminating any manufacturing downtime associated with assigned area (where applicable).
* Perform regular component cycle counts as required.
* Perform inventory transactions and reporting on customer systems when required.
* Assist in the development and implementation of any materials management systems that will enhance inventory control at Jabil Circuit.
* Be able to interface with all departmental supervisors, support functions, engineering, program management, and other pertinent functions within the plant operations.
* Adhere to all safety and health rules and regulations associated with this position and as directed by supervisor.
* Comply and follow all procedures within the company security policy.
* May perform other duties and responsibilities as assigned.

**Job Qualifications**
**KNOWLEDGE REQUIREMENTS**

* Ability to effectively present information and respond to questions from groups of managers, clients, customers, and the general public.
* Ability to define problems, collect data, establish facts, and draw valid conclusions.
* Ability to operate a personal computer including using a Windows based operating system and related software.
* Advanced PC skills, including training and knowledge of Jabil’s software packages.
* Ability to write simple correspondence. Read and understand visual aid.
* Ability to apply common sense understanding to carry out simple one- or two-step instructions.
* Ability to deal with standardized situations with only occasional or no variables.
* Ability to read and comprehend simple instructions, short correspondence, and memos.
* Ability to add, subtract, multiply, and divide in all units of measure, using whole numbers, common fractions, and decimals.
* Ability to compute rate, ratio, and percent and to draw and interpret graphs.

, BE AWARE OF FRAUD: When applying for a job at Jabil you will be contacted via correspondence through our official job portal with a jabil.com e-mail address; direct phone call from a member of the Jabil team; or direct e-mail with a jabil.com e-mail address. Jabil does not request payments for interviews or at any other point during the hiring process. Jabil will not ask for your personal identifying information such as a social security number, birth certificate, financial institution, driver’s license number or passport information over the phone or via e-mail. If you believe you are a victim of identity theft, contact your local police department. Any scam job listings should be reported to whatever website it was posted in.

description:
**Requirements**
**Keterampilan yang Dibutuhkan**

* Kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif, termasuk mendengar secara aktif.
* Kemampuan dalam menggunakan Microsoft Excel, khususnya untuk fungsi-fungsi lanjutan seperti VLOOKUP dan Pivot Table.
* Pemahaman mengenai sistem informasi HR (HRIS) untuk pengelolaan data karyawan.
* Kemampuan untuk menggunakan alat tes psikologi seperti DISC atau Kraeplin.
* Kemampuan mengelola dan merawat lingkungan kerja.

**Responsibilities**
Deskripsi pekerjaan (job description) untuk Staf HR meliputi tugas rekrutmen dan seleksi karyawan, pengelolaan administrasi karyawan seperti absensi, kontrak, dan penggajian, penyediaan pelatihan dan pengembangan karyawan, pemeliharaan hubungan baik dengan karyawan dan kepatuhan terhadap hukum ketenagakerjaan, serta pengelolaan lingkungan kerja dan fasilitas perusahaan.
  
  
Tanggung Jawab Utama Staf HR
  
  
**Rekrutmen & Seleksi**
Memasang lowongan kerja, melakukan proses wawancara, dan menyeleksi kandidat untuk mendapatkan karyawan yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan perusahaan.
  
  
**Administrasi Karyawan**
Mengelola data karyawan, absensi, cuti, dan memastikan administrasi HR seperti surat tugas, surat kontrak, dan pembayaran BPJS berjalan lancar.
  
  
**Payroll & Kompensasi**
Melakukan perhitungan gaji dan memastikan kompensasi serta benefit karyawan sesuai dengan aturan yang berlaku.
  
  
**Pelatihan & Pengembangan**
Merancang dan menyelenggarakan program pelatihan untuk meningkatkan keterampilan karyawan dan mendukung perencanaan karier mereka.
  
  
**Manajemen Kinerja**
Memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja karyawan untuk memastikan produktivitas dan kondisi kerja yang optimal.
  
  
**Kepatuhan Hukum**
Mengerti dan menganalisis undang-undang ketenagakerjaan terkait kontrak kerja, penggajian, dan hak-hak karyawan.
  
  
**Hubungan Karyawan**
Mendengarkan keluhan karyawan, menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang aman dan nyaman, serta memotivasi karyawan.

The Procurement Officer ensures that SCG Indonesia secures the right products and services at the best value, while maintaining strong supplier relationships and upholding compliance standards. This role supports our businesses in
**cement, packaging, and trading**
, working with both local and regional vendors.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Handle purchasing requests, RFQs, and vendor negotiations to secure competitive pricing.
* Develop and maintain relationships with suppliers, monitoring performance and service quality.
* Coordinate with internal teams to understand material/service requirements and delivery schedules.
* Manage contracts, purchase orders, and related documentation in compliance with company policies.
* Track and analyze procurement data to identify cost-saving opportunities.
* Ensure alignment with SCG’s standards on sustainability, compliance, and corporate governance.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Supply Chain, Engineering, or related field.
* 1–3 years of experience in procurement or purchasing roles.
* Strong negotiation, analytical, and vendor management skills.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office; ERP experience is an advantage.
* Clear communication in
  **Bahasa Indonesia**
  and
  **English**
  .

**Career Development**

This role provides exposure to regional supply networks and growth opportunities in procurement strategy, vendor management, or supply chain leadership within SCG.

description:
**Deskripsi Pekerjaan**

* Mengidentifikasi sumber data yang relevan, mengumpulkan data yang dibutuhkan, serta melengkapi data yang hilang atau tidak lengkap dari sistem internal dan eksternal.
* Melakukan pembersihan, validasi, dan persiapan data untuk memastikan akurasi, konsistensi, dan kemudahan penggunaan data.
* Mengorganisir dan menyusun data mentah ke dalam format yang siap digunakan untuk analisis dan pelaporan.
* Menganalisis dataset untuk menjawab pertanyaan bisnis tertentu dan menghasilkan insight yang dapat ditindaklanjuti.
* Mengidentifikasi tren, pola, dan anomali dalam data untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan berbasis data.
* Mengembangkan visualisasi data, dashboard, dan laporan analitis menggunakan tools yang sesuai.
* Menyiapkan dan mempresentasikan laporan analisis serta dashboard kepada manajemen eksekutif dan tim proyek.
* Melakukan pelatihan dan sesi knowledge sharing, termasuk menyusun materi pelatihan serta mendukung tim lain dalam memahami struktur data dan konsep visualisasi.

**Persyaratan**

* Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Sistem Informasi, Ilmu Komputer, Statistik, Matematika, atau bidang terkait.
* Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 2 tahun sebagai Data Analyst atau posisi lain yang berfokus pada data.
* Memiliki kemampuan organisasi, manajemen waktu, penentuan prioritas, dan multitasking yang baik dengan tingkat ketelitian yang tinggi.
* Mahir menggunakan Power BI, termasuk data modeling, DAX, pembuatan dashboard, publikasi laporan, dan pengaturan refresh data.
* Menguasai Microsoft Excel tingkat lanjut, termasuk Pivot Table, Power Query, formula lanjutan (INDEX-MATCH/XLOOKUP, array formulas), serta Macro.
* Memiliki kemampuan SQL yang kuat (GoogleSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, atau sejenisnya) untuk query kompleks, ekstraksi, dan transformasi data.
* Berpengalaman dalam proses integrasi data; memiliki pemahaman integrasi data SAP melalui SAP GUI menjadi nilai tambah.
* Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik serta mampu menjelaskan hasil analisis kepada stakeholder non-teknis.

description:
**About the Role**

We are looking for a
**Data Scientist – Credit Analytics**
to build, analyze, and optimize credit risk models that support Electrum’s financing, rent-to-own, and partner credit programs. In this role, you will work closely with Risk, Finance, Product, and Operations teams to translate data into actionable insights that drive better credit decisions, portfolio performance, and customer outcomes.

You will play a key role in developing data-driven frameworks for credit scoring, approval, monitoring, and loss mitigation across Electrum’s ecosystem.

**What You Will Do**
**Credit Modeling & Analytics**

* Develop and maintain
  **credit scoring models**
  , risk segmentation, and decision frameworks.
* Analyze customer, transaction, and behavioral data to assess creditworthiness and default risk.
* Build and validate predictive models for approval rate, delinquency, default, and recovery.
* Monitor portfolio performance metrics such as
  **NPL, PD, LGD, ECL, and vintage analysis**
  .

**Data Analysis & Insights**

* Conduct deep-dive analyses to identify drivers of credit performance and risk trends.
* Perform cohort, funnel, and behavioral analysis to improve underwriting and credit policy.
* Translate complex data findings into clear insights and recommendations for stakeholders.
* Support A/B testing and experimentation for credit rules, pricing, and policy changes.

**Risk Strategy & Decision Support**

* Partner with Risk and Business teams to define credit policies, cut-offs, and eligibility rules.
* Provide data support for credit strategy initiatives including limit setting, pricing, and collections.
* Design dashboards and monitoring tools to track portfolio health and early warning indicators.

**Data Engineering & Governance**

* Work with Data Engineering teams to ensure data quality, availability, and reliability.
* Define data requirements, feature engineering logic, and data documentation standards.
* Ensure compliance with data governance, privacy, and regulatory standards.

**What You Bring**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Engineering, or related field.
* 2–5 years of experience in
  **credit analytics, risk modeling, or financial data science**
  .
* Strong proficiency in
  **Python or R**
  for data analysis and modeling.
* Solid understanding of
  **statistical modeling, machine learning, and predictive analytics**
  .
* Experience working with structured datasets (SQL, data warehouses).
* Knowledge of credit risk concepts such as
  **PD, LGD, EAD, NPL, IFRS 9 / PSAK 71**
  is a strong advantage.
* Ability to clearly communicate insights to non-technical stakeholders.

**Nice to Have**

* Experience in fintech, lending, BNPL, rent-to-own, or consumer finance.
* Familiarity with alternative data sources (telemetry, transactional, behavioral data).
* Experience with BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Power BI).
* Exposure to model governance, validation, or regulatory reporting.

description:
🚀 Job Opportunity:
**Recruitment & Employer Branding Executive**
at StickEarn
  
  
**About StickEarn**
StickEarn is an advertising technology company on a mission to transform Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising through technology, data, and creativity. We empower brands, agencies, and media owners to create impactful advertising experiences across Indonesia.
  
  
As a
**Recruitment & Employer Branding Executive**
, you’ll play a key role in attracting and hiring the right talent for our growing team, while also strengthening our presence as an employer of choice. From sourcing to selection and onboarding, you'll be involved in the full recruitment cycle and drive impactful employer branding initiatives that reflect our culture and values.
  
  
🌟
**What You’ll Do**

* Assist in implementing the overall recruitment strategy across tech and non-tech roles.
* Execute hiring strategies for various levels, from entry level to managerial positions.
* Source qualified candidates using a mix of active and passive sourcing techniques, job portals, social platforms, and talent databases.
* Conduct interviews using structured methods and assess candidates' core competencies and cultural fit.
* Support the onboarding process and ensure smooth coordination between candidates and internal teams.
* Maintain and manage a talent pipeline database, ensuring timely updates and reporting.
* Provide well-documented recruitment reports and hiring analytics to support decision-making.
* Collaborate with the HR team to develop and execute creative employer branding campaigns, both online and offline.

✅
**What We’re Looking For**

* Bachelor’s degree from any major.
* Minimum 1 year of experience as a Recruiter in a tech company, startup, or recruitment agency, or fresh graduates with relevant internship experience are welcome to apply.
* Strong understanding of recruitment across both technical and non-technical roles.
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to engage candidates and stakeholders professionally.
* Proficient in English, both written and spoken.
* Passionate about connecting with people and building teams.
* Proactive, creative, and eager to contribute to a fast-paced and collaborative environment.

🎁
**What We Offer**

* Private insurance to keep you covered
* Training budget & laptop ownership program to support your growth
* Competitive compensation package with yearly bonus
* Flexible leave & anniversary leave to support work-life balance and personal milestones

If you're passionate about recruitment and want to help shape the future of our team while amplifying our employer brand, we’d love to hear from you. Join us and help attract the best talent to StickEarn.
  
  
*Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.*
